generated_categories.name: Default Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers baseline email validation with default options and maximum length constraints.

generated_categories.name: Display Name Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests behavior related to display names, including allowing, requiring, and rejecting specific formats or characters.

generated_categories.description: Ensures proper handling of UTF-8 characters and quoted local parts in email addresses.

generated_categories.name: TLD and Domain Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests behavior when TLDs are optional, and domain-specific rules such as blacklists, whitelists, and IP domains.

generated_categories.name: Blacklist and Whitelist Validation
generated_categories.description: Validates emails against blacklisted characters or domains and ensures only whitelisted domains are accepted.

generated_categories.name: Domain-Specific Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests validation rules specific to certain domains, such as Gmail and Googlemail.
